# Skills Manifest
**Auto-generated:** 2026-03-11 | **Total skills:** ~80
**Source:** `find ~/Documents -iname "SKILL.md"` (excludes worktrees and plugin-marketplace copies)

---

## How to Use This Manifest

- **Invoke**: `/<skill-name>` in Claude Code chat, or Claude calls it automatically based on description matching
- **Location**: Skills live in `.claude/skills/<name>/SKILL.md` (project-scoped) or `skills/<name>/SKILL.md` (repo-level)
- **Status legend**: тЬЕ Active ┬╖ ЁЯУж Archived ┬╖ ЁЯФз Template ┬╖ тЪая╕П Needs Review

## Adding a New Skill

1. Create `.claude/skills/<skill-name>/SKILL.md` in your project
2. Required frontmatter: `name`, `description`, `tools`
3. Optional: `disable-model-invocation: true` (user-only) or `user-invocable: false` (Claude-only)
4. Add entry to this manifest under the appropriate project section
5. If globally useful тЖТ submit to a plugin

```yaml
---
name: my-skill
description: What it does and when Claude should invoke it.
tools: Read, Grep, Bash
---
# My Skill
...
```
